steps.title: Extract times from the table and find their sum
steps.content:
The five task times are: 8, 6, 14, 11, and 11 minutes. Their sum is:
$$8 + 6 + 14 + 11 + 11 = 50$$

steps.title: Calculate the mean
steps.content:
Divide the total time by the number of tasks:
$$\text{Mean}=\frac{50}{5}=10$$
Desmos can compute the same value directly from the table list. That matches choice B, so B is correct.
